goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'pizza express Fen Ditton'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '3 people' at '11:45' on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'arrive by 16:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called pizza express Fen Ditton
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 11:45 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to birmingham new street and should leave on sunday
The train should arrive by 16:30 and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
